case_title: DOMINICK H MACAN VS. LEISURE TRAVEL DEVELOPMENT, LTD, A WASHINGTON

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACAN, DOMINICK H AS TO DEFENDANT LEISURE TRAVEL DEVELOPMENT, LTD, A WASHINGTON CORP., DBA ADVENTURE EXPRESS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
